name: mistral-mcp
description: Mistral AI capabilities for Claude Code: chat, OCR, vision, audio (Voxtral), Codestral FIM, agents, and curated French workflows. Auto-installs the mistral-mcp server from npm.

mistral_api_key.title: Mistral API key
mistral_api_key.description: Your Mistral API key. Get one at https://console.mistral.ai/. Stored by Claude Code's secrets storage, never written to settings.json.
